occurrence_sentence: The infrastructure is not just theoretical—it is being developed. The XPANSE Initiative, launched at the Make It in the Emirates Summit (May 2025), brought together national leaders like ADNOC and global tech stakeholders to turn quantum concepts into practical energy, logistics, and security solutions.
